name: UI / UX Feedback
description: Share feedback on the Samaris OS desktop experience
title: "[UI] Short description"
labels: ["ui-feedback"]
body: |

  ## Version
  Samaris OS Mountain Lake Alpha One (ISO / build date)

  ## Environment
  - [ ] VM (software + host OS)
  - [ ] Physical hardware (device model)

  ## Area of Feedback
  - [ ] Desktop shell / window system
  - [ ] Dock
  - [ ] Themes (Day / Night)
  - [ ] Lock screen / Guest mode
  - [ ] Specific app (name it below)
  - [ ] App Store
  - [ ] Onboarding
  - [ ] Settings
  - [ ] Animation / performance
  - [ ] Other

  ## Feedback
  Describe what you liked, what was confusing, what could be improved.

  ## Suggestion
  How would you improve it?

  ## Screenshots / Recording
  Attach if available.

  ---
  *Feedback sent via contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
